code:
import io
import string

fn cap(_ w: String) -> String
  match string.byte_at(w, 0)
  when Some(b)
    if b >= 97 and b <= 122
      let nb = b - 32
      "#{string.from_byte(nb)}#{string.substring(w, 1, string.len(w))}"
    else
      w
    end
  when None
    w
  end
end

match io.read_line()
when Some(line)
  let words = string.split_whitespace(line)
  mut out = ""
  mut first = true
  for w in words
    if first
      out = cap(w)
      first = false
    else
      out = "#{out} #{cap(w)}"
    end
  end
  println(out)
when None
  println("")
end
